{{Quote|Warning to all spacefarers. Asteroid belt exists in outer orbit. Follow transponder buoys for safe passage. Tampering with buoys a capital offense.|A warning given to spacefarers in the Lazerian system|<ref name="TSoK" />}}
The '''Rokwahl Asteroid Belt''' was located in the [[Lazerian system/Legends|Lazerian system]], occupying its eighth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position.<ref name="TSoK" /> The [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] was located within the [[Kira sector/Legends|Kira sector]],<ref name="TEA-OC" /> in the [[Trailing Sectors]] portion of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="TEA" /> Rokwahl orbited the [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Star/Legends|star]] known as [[Lazerian (star)|Lazerian]] and was found along the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]] known as the [[Harrin Trade Corridor]] and [[Kira Run]].<ref name="TSoK" />

At some point, Rokwahl, alongside the rest of the system, was surveyed by the [[Lazerian (people)|Lazerians]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lazerian IV]]. Some of the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] were used for [[Mining/Legends|mining]] purposes, and a series of [[transponder buoy]]s were positioned in the belt to allow [[Starship/Legends|starship]] traffic to pass through unharmed. A warning to spacefarers informed them of the buoys and stated that tampering with them was a capital offense.<ref name="TSoK" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Rokwahl Asteroid Belt was created by [[John Terra]] and introduced in [[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']], a [[1993]] supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="TSoK" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Lazerian system, and therefore the Rokwahl Asteroid Belt, in grid square N-15.<ref name="TEA" />
